detail.description:
This game is a clever and calm word puzzle where every connection matters, designed for fans of brain and mind challenges. Your goal is simple: match the bubble words to their correct categories and clear the board in this smart sorting experience.

Tap bubbles, identify themes, and find the perfect flow as you sort words into groups using pure logic and vocabulary. Smooth mechanics and responsive controls make every play feel precise and satisfying.

With gradually increasing difficulty and tho
